gist.headline: Daily News Sync
gist.blurb: Polly's been busy organizing the latest community highlights and news for the front page.
gist.summary: Automated sync of the latest news and community apps to the README and social pipeline.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's landing page and social feeds up to date with recent activity.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing a stack of daily newspapers or pinning a news bulletin to a board.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing a stack of tiny newspapers on a wooden desk. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
